title: Link to an existing item in Doc (similar to Create New Item feature)
excerpt: I would love if we could get an option to copy the link of a selected/checked item within our boards, but an easier option could be ability to add items/tasks directly into a Monday Doc so that it’s easier for folks to r…

posts.author: maddiefortna (Maddie Fortna)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love if we could get an option to copy the link of a selected/checked item within our boards, but an easier option could be ability to add items/tasks directly into a Monday Doc so that it’s easier for folks to reference specific tasks when viewing todos in a written format. Overall, linking directly to multiple tasks is very time consuming and having an easier way to do that would be so much more productive for teams who communicative via slack.

posts.author: JanieW (Janie Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree, I love the Create New Item feature but it has some limitations. If I mistype or want to update the title later, I can update it within the board but this isn’t reflected in the Monday Doc.
Also in my Monday Doc, for existing board items, the only way of referencing them in a similar way to the New Items is by including the whole board as a Table Widget. If there was an Board Item Widget that worked similarly to Create New Item, this would solve both of these issues.
